evaluators.name: Monthly Lawn Mowing Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user requested a quote for a qualifying small-yard ongoing mowing plan under $120/month and chose the highest-rated such plan.

evaluators.name: Spring Cleanup Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked the one-time spring yard cleanup on March 15 at the first time slot starting at or after 3:00 PM with pay-on-site payment.

evaluators.name: Custom Landscaping Package Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user built a custom package with exactly lawn mowing, hedge trimming, and flower bed mulching at the specified frequencies, total between $300–$400, and finalized it for review.

evaluators.name: Residential Mow & Leaf Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user chose the best qualifying residential maintenance plan (with mowing & leaf removal, ≤$150/month) with the most visits and proceeded to checkout with monthly billing.

evaluators.name: Drought-Tolerant Front Yard Consultation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user requested a consultation for the highest-rated drought-tolerant service within the $200–$600 range and mentioned the front yard in the request.

evaluators.name: First-Time Promo on One-Time Mowing Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added a one-time lawn mowing service, correctly applied the 10% first-time customer promo in the cart, and proceeded to the payment step (pending_payment order).

evaluators.name: Backyard Patio with Fire Pit Design Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited the third backyard medium patio+fire pit project and submitted a design request referencing that specific project.

evaluators.name: Service Area & Cancellation FAQ Contact Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched and viewed the Service Areas and Cancellation Policy FAQ articles, then submitted a contact form asking about service availability in ZIP 60610 and how the cancellation policy applies.
